basic_details.job_title: DRDO MTRDC Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Microwave Tube Research and Development Centre (DRDO MTRDC)
basic_details.short_information: Microwave Tube Research and Development Centre (DRDO MTRDC) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released on the official website DRDO. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the DRDO MTRDC Paid Internship Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Final year B.Tech / M.Tech / M.Sc students in specified disciplines with minimum 75% marks or 7.5 CGPA from AICTE/UGC approved institutions
qualification.details: Final year UG/PG students pursuing full time course in respective discipline from recognized Indian University/Institute with 75% marks or 7.5 CGPA. Disciplines include: Electronics Engineering/ECE/EIE, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Physics.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Paid Internship ship (Electronics Engineering/ECE/EIE, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Physics)

selection_process: CGPA based shortlisting Online interview / interaction Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO MTRDC Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.drdo.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO MTRDC Paid Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the DRDO MTRDC Paid Intern positions is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Paid Intern post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be final year B.Tech, M.Tech, or M.Sc students in specified disciplines with a minimum of 75% marks or 7.5 CGPA from AICTE/UGC approved institutions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this internship program?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 28 years. There is no mention of a minimum age limit in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend offered for the Paid Intern position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000 per month for the duration of the internship.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Paid Intern positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves CGPA-based shortlisting, followed by an online interview or interaction. Document verification and the creation of a merit list will also be part of the selection procedure.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the DRDO MTRDC Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via Speed Post or Registered Post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Which disciplines are eligible for the Paid Internship?
faq.answer: Eligible disciplines include Electronics Engineering/ECE/EIE, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Physics.

faq.question: Q9. When will the selected students be intimated?
faq.answer: Selected students will be intimated by 25th June 2026. This will be followed by the commencement of the internship on 01st July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DRDO, which is https://www.drdo.gov.in. Please refer to the Important Links section for direct access.
